source.sqlReaderQuery: select count(*) as recordcount from saleslt.customer
select count(*) as productCount from saleslt.product
select count(*) as recordcount from saleslt.customer
select max(ModifiedDate) as LastModifiedDate from saleslt.customer

sqlReaderQuery.value: select * from saleslt.customer where ModifiedDate > '@{activity('Get HWM datatime').output.firstRow.Prop_0}' and ModifiedDate <= '@{activity('Get LastModified from Customer').output.firstRow.LastModifiedDate}'

source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select A.Title,A.FirstName,A.MiddleName,A.LastName,C.AddressLine1,C.AddressLine2,C.City,C.StateProvince,C.CountryRegion,C.PostalCode
From [SalesLT].[Customer] A
Inner Join [SalesLT].[CustomerAddress] B
  on A.CustomerID = B.CustomerID
Inner Join [SalesLT].[Address] C
  on B.AddressID = C.AddressID
